title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim founded Paraform, a hiring platform that diverged from AI-first approaches by investing heavily in human recruiters, paying out over $50 million to them. The company 10x'd revenue in 2025 by focusing on recruiter-driven hiring while competitors tried to automate, working with customers like Palantir and Rippling. Kim argues that AI automation has made hiring noisier rather than faster, requiring 5,000 cold emails to make a single engineering hire compared to 500 five years ago.
